title: backend: oidc: Evict abandoned state tokens to prevent memory leak
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: evictExpiredOidcStates extracted as a package-level function so tests call production codepath directly.
Ticker at OidcStateTTL/2 with defer ticker.Stop() ensures timely eviction without goroutine leak.
Goroutine selects on ctx.Done() for clean server shutdown.
Deterministic test with stale/fresh entries directly exercises the eviction boundary condition.
